concerns.text: SC-006 states 'A substantial majority of knots with computable invariants have all invariants populated' — 'substantial majority' is not quantified. Specify threshold (e.g., '≥90%' or '≥95%') to make this measurable.

SC-012 states 'achieves a high match threshold for pass/fail status' — 'high match threshold' is vague. FR-003 specifies '≥90%' but SC-012 does not explicitly state this threshold for independent verification.

FR-005 states 'ensuring sufficient statistical power to detect medium effect sizes (Cohen's f² ≥ a medium effect size)' — circular phrasing. Assumptions section specifies '≥0.15'; FR should match this numeric threshold for verifiability.
